title: Velvety Light Filipino Cranberries Pudding
description: A creamy and light Filipino dessert featuring dried cranberries, this pudding is a perfect treat for any occasion, and it is sugar-free-friendly.
instructions: Soak the dried cranberries in water for 4 hours, then drain and set aside.
In a blender, combine the coconut milk, almond milk, egg yolks, stevia powder, vanilla extract, and salt, and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a bamboo tray and place it in a bain-marie.
Heat the bain-marie over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens and the pudding is set.
Remove the pudding from the bain-marie and stir in the soaked cranberries.
Let the pudding cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled.
Serve the pudding chilled, garnished with additional dried cranberries if desired.
